title: Visitacion Valley Greenway | California Trails | TrailLink
content: Find Trails  >  California  >  Visitacion Valley Greenway. # Visitacion Valley Greenway. # Register for free! Register for free with TrailLink today! Save your own favorite trails. ### Visitacion Valley Greenway Facts. ### Visitacion Valley Greenway Photos. ### Visitacion Valley Greenway Description. The Visitacion Valley Greenway is a recreational gem tucked into a residential neighborhood in southern San Francisco. Clustered near the southern end of the trail is the local elementary school, library, post office, and other community facilities, so the greenway also provides a pleasant way for residents to reach them. Metered parking is available on the southern end of the trail along Leland Avenue. On-street parking is also available along the other streets that the greenway crosses. ### Visitacion Valley Greenway Reviews. I am biased, but the Greenway is my favorite part of living in Vis Valley. There are a lot of varieties of birds through all the trails, along with some friendly neighborhood cats!

title: In SF's Visitacion Valley, A Hidden Greenway Bears Surprising Fruit
content: # In SF’s Visitacion Valley, A Hidden Greenway Bears Surprising Fruit. With heirloom apples, papaya, and plenty of butterflies, the community garden and pocket parks bring a lush oasis to southeastern San Francisco. * Share on Bluesky (Opens in new window) Bluesky. * Share on LinkedIn (Opens in new window) LinkedIn. In the Visitacion Valley Greenway’s two community gardens sprout a cornucopia of fruits and vegetables. *Welcome to the latest in The Frisc’s periodic column Explore!, in which we encourage readers to enjoy the city’s less heralded outdoor places. This abundance springs not from a commercial plot or a hip restaurant’s rooftop greenhouse, but from the Agricultural Garden section of the Visitacion Valley Greenway, a string of six mini-parks that run like jewels on a necklace through the southeast San Francisco neighborhood. > The greenway has winding paths and hidden nooks; the Agricultural Garden section is more of a free-for-all where anyone can come plant things like mystery squash.

title: Visitacion Valley Greenway - Our Work in CA
content: # Visitacion Valley Greenway. Visitacion Valley Greenway featured image. This long, narrow series of parks steps diagonally down a San Francisco hillside through formerly vacant lots. The greenway includes a plaza, community garden, two greenhouses, playground, native plant garden, agricultural lot, herb garden, and a barbecue pit. As recently as a decade ago the neighborhood was desperately short of open space. TPL worked with two city agencies to acquire the land for the greenway; designed and built the Hans Schiller Plaza, the park entryway; and in 2008, redesigned the community garden on the final lot to increase the number and accessibility of gardening plots.
